purpose: First desktop app wrapper skeleton: expose the generated Local Evolution Agent app shell as a local, read-only preview with explicit future packaging path.
writes: state/desktop_app_wrapper_status.json when status is captured by caller

futurePackaging.recommended: Tauri or Electron after controls are stable

verificationGates: node --check src/preview-server.js
node src/preview-server.js --status
app shell status exists and parses
no dependency install required
control preview does not mutate app_control_state.json
pause-all execution mutates only app_control_state.pauseAll and is reversible via execute-resume-all
sensitive controls are previewed as gated/blocked
diagnostics export is local-only and redacts common secret keys
native tray contract is planning-only: no dependency install and no persistent process
tray readiness diagnostics pass before any native scaffold decision
packaging preflight performs no dependency install or scaffold creation
electron fallback plan performs no dependency install or scaffold creation
test matrix passes without dependency install, scaffold creation, persistent process, or sensitive actions
operations docs consolidate current wrapper commands, safety invariants, and rollback path
audit viewer summarizes local audit ledgers without external writes or sensitive actions
home summary provides a compact landing state for future tray/dashboard UI without sensitive actions
home routes expose compact landing JSON/Markdown through the local preview server only
service recovery drill previews Gateway/watchdog recovery without executing system changes
multi-agent board summarizes specialist roles, reports, and handoff rules without spawning agents
physical scenario matrix verifies simulator allow/block behavior without real device calls
next connector queue ranks safe reversible follow-up work and gates approval-required paths
voice/body readiness matrix verifies manual audio path and privacy gates without recording
multi-agent handoff ruleset defines when to use architect/researcher/builder/auditor/resource guardian while main persona keeps judgment
approval gate register lists blocked sensitive paths and exact unblock requirements without changing permissions
release readiness scorecard summarizes desktop companion maturity and remaining productization blockers without changing state
morning progress digest creates a compact local-only progress summary without external sending
decision boundary packet lists next productization/privacy choices with approval text, rollback, and risks without granting approval
